EmailTemplate.description: Confirmation to RAF referee that we cannot give personal details of the person they referred.
EmailTemplate.name: RAF - Referee Chasing Voucher (old process)
EmailTemplate.subject: Your RAF Enquiry
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
Due to data protection regulations, I am unable to supply any details relating to another customer.
Please confirm the name and email address of the person you referred and I will investigate on your behalf and get back to you with any information I can.
Please be advised that once your friend has purchased, vouchers are not sent until 28 days after their policy start date.
In some circumstances, we may have received your friend's details from another source before your own referral. In this case, the referral is attributed to the initial source, and therefore the refer a friend offer does not apply.
If your friend would like to contact us directly, we will happily discuss the details of their policy with them.
If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to get in touch.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
